/usr/bin/ar qc ../../lib/libDtcp.a CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpBaseConnAcceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpBaseConnConnector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpBaseConnMux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpBaseConnTransport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpBaseUdpTransport.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpBroadcast.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpBroadcastMgr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpBroadcastSet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpBroadcastStates.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpConnectionMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpConnPacket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpDataPacket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpIORecord.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpMonitorThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpNetId.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpPacket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpPendingAckMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpSendQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpSocketThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpStack.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpStackThread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtcpThreadTable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/DtlsWrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Dtcp.dir/PeerTlsVerifier.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../lib/libDtcp.a
